2604.17794.title: Bridging the Reasoning Gap in Vietnamese with Small Language Models via Test-Time Scaling
2604.17794.paper_summary: The democratization of ubiquitous AI hinges on deploying sophisticated reasoning capabilities on resource-constrained devices. However, Small Language Models (SLMs) often face a "reasoning gap", particularly in non-English languages like Vietnamese, where they struggle to maintain coherent chains of thought. This paper investigates Test-Time Scaling strategies for the Qwen3-1.7B architecture within the context of Vietnamese Elementary Mathematics. We introduce Vi-S1K, a high-fidelity reasoning dataset localized via a Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite powered pipeline, and Vi-Elementary-Bench, a dual-resource benchmark for rigorous evaluation. Using an LLM-as-a-Judge protocol, we reveal that the base model possesses robust latent knowledge (Accuracy: 4.05/5.00) but suffers from a severe "formatting gap" in communication. Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) acts as a critical "reasoning unlocker", yielding a 77% improvement in Explanation Quality and bridging the gap between raw calculation and pedagogical coherence. Furthermore, our analysis of prompting strategies uncovers a significant trade-off: structured frameworks like ReAct impose a "cognitive tax" on the 1.7B parameter capacity, degrading performance relative to pure Chain-of-Thought (CoT) combined with Self-Consistency. These findings establish a deployment hierarchy for SLMs, demonstrating that SFT combined with simplified test-time scaling is superior to complex agentic workflows for edge-based reasoning.
2604.17794.paper_summary_zh: 普及型 AI 的民主化依賴於在資源受限的設備上部署複雜的推理能力。<lb/>然而，小型語言模型（SLMs）常常面臨「推理差距」，特別是在越南語等非英語語言中，它們難以保持連貫的思維鏈。<lb/>本文探討了在越南小學數學背景下，Qwen3-1.7B 架構的測試時擴展策略。<lb/>我們介紹了 Vi-S1K，一個通過 Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite 驅動的管道本地化的高保真推理數據集，以及 Vi-Elementary-Bench，一個用於嚴格評估的雙資源基準。<lb/>使用 LLM-as-a-Judge 協議，我們揭示了基礎模型擁有強大的潛在知識（準確率：4.05/5.00），但在交流中遭遇嚴重的「格式差距」。<lb/>監督微調（SFT）作為一個關鍵的「推理解鎖器」，在解釋質量上帶來了 77% 的改善，並彌補了原始計算與教學一致性之間的差距。<lb/>此外，我們對提示策略的分析揭示了一個重要的權衡：像 ReAct 這樣的結構化框架對 1.7B 參數容量施加了「認知稅」，相對於純粹的思維鏈（CoT）結合自我一致性，性能下降。<lb/>這些發現為 SLMs 建立了一個部署層級，表明 SFT 結合簡化的測試時擴展優於複雜的代理工作流程，用於邊緣推理。
2604.17794.author: Bui The Trung et.al.
2604.17794.authors: Bui The Trung, Do Minh Duc, Nguyen Van Vinh, Bui Nguyen Quoc Trinh
